Review QA ChecklistSeven-persona readiness pass

Stakeholder checklist

Use this page as a review checklist before showing the site to stakeholders.

The checklist keeps the demo honest, keeps the story aligned, and helps the reviewer separate the public stakeholder launchpad from the preserved internal audit dashboard.

Readiness reminders

Static demo only. No runtime activation. No public writes. No command execution. No automation.

Non-technical first impression

Can a first-time visitor explain what the site is in one sentence?

Technical reviewer

Do the exact counts, links, and validators match the source artifacts?

Product / UX reviewer

Does the launchpad feel clean, obvious, and easy to navigate?

AI / Agent reviewer

Is the agent registry concrete, exact, and clearly static?

Security / Risk reviewer

Are runtime, writes, and command execution clearly disabled?

Recruiter / Portfolio reviewer

Does the work read as polished, credible, and presentation-ready?

Skeptical reviewer

What would you challenge, and is the answer visible on the page?

Checklist order

  1. Open the Command Center Launchpad.
  2. Open the Premium Stakeholder Demo.
  3. Open the Runnable Static Simulator.
  4. Check System Scale and Agent Registry.
  5. Check Safety Boundaries and Review / Scorecard.
  6. Keep the internal audit dashboard for archive review only.

© 2026 Devin O’Rourke. All rights reserved.

Agent Command Center, the demo pages, registry presentation, dashboard copy, visual layout, simulator materials, validator descriptions, and stakeholder presentation materials are protected project materials. No license, sale, transfer, or permission to reuse is granted by viewing this demo.

This site is a static, read-only demonstration. It does not enable live automation, command execution, database writes, Supabase mutations, deployment actions, rollback execution, alert sending, or runtime activation.

Third-party names, platforms, and services referenced for context remain the property of their respective owners.
